{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211323222A268D93A319ADFB32A2"}"},"total":38},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606011573738472217","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这哥们写得不错，情节描写不在二月河之下，有底蕴。建议写过的东西再复查一下，该修改就修改，金庸还改了好几遍呢，不是所有逻辑都完整，不接受就当我没说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770916761,"group_id":"7540468368810200088","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+rZ2Sh2Hn+8BhamGqYpvN8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5ef5cb36f229405dbaae0caa5a922793~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621685&x-signature=%2FZWgCPE7Lk2a2DLGpQ2wxmqy%2Fhc%3D","user_id":"58948411381","user_name":"浩明打老虎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"58948411381","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7540468368810200088","book_info":{"abstract":"胤䄉：老子带着战备仓库穿越康末十阿哥，大炮灰自然要闹个大动静出来！
…………
康熙：好儿子，你给老子吃的什么仙丹如此神效？
胤䄉：安啦，布洛芬而已。
老四：老十，为什么你中了火枪还不死？
胤䄉：防弹衣听说过吗？
老八：老十，朝中大臣为什么都听你的？ 
胤䄉：我带他们开疆扩土，万古流芳。
十三：十哥，那冒火怪物轻松干掉整团罗刹鬼，是何方神圣？
胤䄉：重机枪罢了。
十七：十哥，印度的边界怎么分？
胤䄉：按唐时规矩，恒河以北归我们。
……

3","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错的一本夺嫡清宫文，希望保持更新量，老十的智商和政治智慧有点低，如果当帝王可以适当调高一到二级，勇武战阵更要调整，毕竟也是现在军队干过的。智力是二个灵魂融合的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760545910,"group_id":"7540468368810200088","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxxSFXvy1sZLcEUZVr+Pq+HLAcQZ2hmf7Im9y18MR4f+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2645884471607604","user_name":"爱看小说的老友"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2645884471607604","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7540468368810200088","book_info":{"abstract":"胤䄉：老子带着战备仓库穿越康末十阿哥，大炮灰自然要闹个大动静出来！
